title: CI VMs: bump to f41
body:
Built in https://github.com/containers/automation_images/pull/392

Signed-off-by: Ed Santiago <santiago@redhat.com>
```release-note
None
```

comments.body:
[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *edsantiago* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Fpodman). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/main/OWNERS)~~ [edsantiago] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment
FYI I just remembered https://github.com/containers/podman/commit/d03e8ffc56e4337d6b14e9b4d0569555b0aadb3d so  that should be reverted to actually test f40 not just f41
I guess we need to revert https://github.com/containers/podman/pull/24236 (or we just skip the test f40 part for a week or so until we get newer kernels) I am fine with whatever you prefer.

All `checkpoint and restore container out of and into pod` tests are now running and passing on [f41](https://api.cirrus-ci.com/v1/artifact/task/5157184160399360/html/int-podman-fedora-41-root-host-sqlite.log.html)  and [rawhide](https://api.cirrus-ci.com/v1/artifact/task/4875709183688704/html/int-podman-rawhide-root-host-sqlite.log.html) with crun 1.18.2. This closes my concern with #24327.
